user.title: Connect to ESPHome Dashboard
user.description: Enter the URL of your ESPHome Dashboard instance and authentication credentials if required.

data_description.url: The full URL to your ESPHome Dashboard (e.g., http://192.168.1.100:6052 or https://esphome.example.com)
data_description.username: Username for dashboard authentication (leave blank if not required)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure ESPHome Dashboard
reconfigure.description: Update the URL or authentication credentials for your ESPHome Dashboard instance.

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate ESPHome Dashboard
reauth_confirm.description: The authentication credentials for {url} are no longer valid. Please enter updated credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the dashboard. Please check the URL and ensure the dashboard is accessible.
error.invalid_url: The provided URL is invalid. Please enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS URL.
error.invalid_dashboard: The URL does not appear to be a valid ESPHome Dashboard.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Please check your username and password.
